title: ophiopogon angustifoliatus
intro: Ophiopogon angustifoliatus, also known as narrow-leaved mondo grass, is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Ophiopogon angustifoliatus has been associated with several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cognitive function, and supporting kidney health. In herbal preparations, Ophiopogon angustifoliatus is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically dried and then used in decoctions or made into capsules for consumption.
